title: lasjia whelanii
intro: Lasjia whelanii, also known as the 'Pipiwai', is a type of climbing fern native to the tropical rainforests of New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasjia whelanii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, it is also used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
